sections.content: Welcome to your **free Economics** lesson on **The market system** (2.1). This is syllabus point 2.1 on **Paper 1 (Multiple Choice)** — structured like a premium revision course, with past-paper practice built in.

items: Master the vocabulary examiners use in mark schemes for The market system
Know which paper (P1) tests this topic most often

Use “Explain simpler” below if the main lesson feels too advanced

sections.content: Cambridge 2281 rewards clear definitions, labelled diagrams, and applied examples from the data. On Paper 1 (Multiple Choice), The market system often appears as MC items or structured questions — plan before writing longer answers.
